heroHeadline: Israel-South Korea Diplomatic Row Signals Widening International Isolation Over Palestine
heroSubtitle: Israel has entered a diplomatic confrontation with South Korea's leadership over Palestinian abuse concerns, expanding international friction beyond Western allies to East Asian partners. The total Palestinian death toll stands at 72,317. Only 21% of promised aid trucks have entered Gaza, and Phase 2 ceasefire talks remain deadlocked.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
